Enumeration Case# kIOVideoFeatureControlClassIDBlackLevel

macOS 10.12+

```
kIOVideoFeatureControlClassIDBlackLevel = 'bklv'
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/kernel/1646200-anonymous/kiovideofeaturecontrolclassidblacklevel#discussion)

A IOVideoFeatureControl that controls the black level offset. The units for the control's absolute value are percetage (%).
